name: @skelm/pr-review-agent
description: Project-agnostic PR review workflow: fetch a PR, classify first-vs-follow-up, produce findings, optionally post a gated review.

workflows.description: Review a pull request and optionally post a gated review.

secrets.name: GITHUB_REVIEW_TOKEN
secrets.description: Read-only GitHub token reference used to fetch PR data.

secrets.name: GITHUB_REVIEW_WRITE_TOKEN
secrets.description: Write-capable GitHub token reference. Required to post a review; omit for read-only.
